human_readable_label: High late-delivery risk and high predicted margin; these orders combine service risk with meaningful expected value.
operational_priority: Prioritize pre-dispatch protection and exception handling before lower-risk work.
logistics_action: High: review carrier/service capacity early, confirm dispatch readiness, and escalate preventable delay risks.
pricing_margin_action: Medium: preserve expected margin by avoiding unnecessary blanket expediting; use targeted intervention when delay risk is actionable.
monitoring_action: Track count share average risk expected profit and predicted margin; monitor whether intervention volume stays operationally manageable.
dashboard_use: Use as the primary AO3 action queue for high-value orders that need risk protection.
evidence_basis: AO3 benchmark identified 13752 orders in this segment representing 39.9 percent of held-out scored orders with average predicted late-delivery probability 0.832 and average predicted margin 0.126.
limitation_caution: Recommendations are limited to predicted risk and predicted margin evidence; they do not establish realized delivery or profit improvement from intervention.
source_policy_status: Not present in recommendation source; AO3 risk-margin matrix policy is approved_for_submission.

human_readable_label: High late-delivery risk and low predicted margin; these orders have service risk but limited expected economic upside.
operational_priority: Review selectively before committing scarce expedited capacity.
logistics_action: Medium: investigate root causes and intervene only when customer impact or SLA exposure justifies the cost.
pricing_margin_action: High: avoid automatic premium-cost expediting because average predicted profit and margin are negative.
monitoring_action: Track as a small exception queue and compare intervention costs against expected value.
dashboard_use: Use as a caution queue where risk is high but margin support is weak.
evidence_basis: AO3 benchmark identified 52 orders in this segment representing 0.15 percent of held-out scored orders with average predicted late-delivery probability 0.811 and average predicted margin -0.127.
limitation_caution: Small segment size means recommendations should be applied case by case and not generalized as a broad operating policy.
source_policy_status: Not present in recommendation source; AO3 risk-margin matrix policy is approved_for_submission.

human_readable_label: Low late-delivery risk and high predicted margin; these orders have expected value but do not require urgent risk intervention.
operational_priority: Maintain standard service quality and protect customer experience without unnecessary escalation.
logistics_action: Medium: keep normal dispatch quality controls and watch for emerging delay indicators.
pricing_margin_action: Low: protect margin by avoiding avoidable intervention cost; do not over-service solely because margin is high.
monitoring_action: Track high-margin volume service consistency and any drift toward higher risk.
dashboard_use: Use as a preserve-service segment for high-margin orders that should remain reliable without urgent escalation.
evidence_basis: AO3 benchmark identified 20603 orders in this segment representing 59.8 percent of held-out scored orders with average predicted late-delivery probability 0.319 and average predicted margin 0.126.
limitation_caution: Recommendations are limited by predicted risk evidence; low predicted risk does not remove the need for normal monitoring and only argues against urgent intervention by default.
source_policy_status: Not present in recommendation source; AO3 risk-margin matrix policy is approved_for_submission.

human_readable_label: Low late-delivery risk and low predicted margin; these orders do not show strong risk or margin reasons for special handling.
operational_priority: Use normal operating procedures and avoid special-cost interventions unless new information appears.
logistics_action: Low: keep routine handling and exception management only when operational alerts emerge.
pricing_margin_action: Medium: monitor pricing or cost drivers because average predicted profit and margin are negative.
monitoring_action: Track count share negative margin exposure and any operational drift.
dashboard_use: Use as the default process segment and a margin-monitoring reference group.
evidence_basis: AO3 benchmark identified 60 orders in this segment representing 0.17 percent of held-out scored orders with average predicted late-delivery probability 0.298 and average predicted margin -0.293.
limitation_caution: Small segment size limits broad conclusions; recommendations should remain conservative.
source_policy_status: Not present in recommendation source; AO3 risk-margin matrix policy is approved_for_submission.

human_readable_label: Missing AO1 or AO2 score inputs; the order cannot be assigned to a reliable operational segment.
operational_priority: Hold automated AO3 prioritization and review score pipeline completeness before actioning from the matrix.
logistics_action: Review only if an external operational alert exists; do not infer risk from missing score fields.
pricing_margin_action: Review data and scoring availability before any margin-driven action.
monitoring_action: Track missing-score count and investigate upstream scoring failures.
dashboard_use: Use as a data-quality exception category rather than an operational priority segment.
evidence_basis: AO3 benchmark reported zero held-out orders in this fallback segment, indicating complete score coverage for the reviewed run.
limitation_caution: Recommendations are limited to data-quality review; if this segment appears in future refreshes it indicates a data or scoring issue, not a direct business recommendation.
source_policy_status: Not present in recommendation source; AO3 risk-margin matrix policy is approved_for_submission.

human_readable_label: Missing or invalid AO3 order value or predicted margin; the order cannot be placed reliably on the margin axis.
operational_priority: Hold automated margin-based prioritization and review denominator or margin construction before actioning.
logistics_action: Review only if independent operational risk evidence exists; do not use the AO3 margin axis until corrected.
pricing_margin_action: High: resolve nonpositive or missing order value and margin inputs before pricing or margin action.
monitoring_action: Track invalid-margin count and investigate upstream AO2 or order-value issues.
dashboard_use: Use as a data-quality exception category for dashboard QA and refresh monitoring.
evidence_basis: AO3 benchmark reported zero held-out orders in this fallback segment, indicating complete margin coverage for the reviewed run.
limitation_caution: Recommendations are limited to data-quality review; if this segment appears in future refreshes it indicates a data-quality issue and should require manual review before business action.
source_policy_status: Not present in recommendation source; AO3 risk-margin matrix policy is approved_for_submission.
